objective: Resolve the build-blocking pacman.conf issue and implement CI-level ISO size validation.

constraints.max_surface_area: Limited to CI pipeline scripts, build configuration, and testing.
architect_must_obey: Modify the root pacman.conf to use DatabaseOptional to unblock the build.
Implement a CI step in build-iso.yml to validate that the built ISO is under 2 GiB.
Ensure tests/verify_build_profile.sh is updated to expect the correct pacman.conf configuration.
Do NOT alter installed system configuration (e.g., airootfs/etc/pacman.conf).
Do NOT implement features from the Deep Audit that have already been resolved (e.g., systemd sandboxing, sudoers fix, Rust path traversal).
